title: limonium cyprium
intro: Limonium cyprium, also known as Cyprus sea lavender, is a flowering plant native to the island of Cyprus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Limonium cyprium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water or oil to create a medicinal preparation.
